data.title: orchestrator dispatches generic agent for code review despite following REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md which mandates named dso:code-reviewer-* agents
data.description:
## Incident Overview
When executing REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4, the orchestrator dispatches a generic general-purpose agent with the reviewer agent file content injected into the prompt. The workflow requires using named dso:code-reviewer-* agents (dso:code-reviewer-light, dso:code-reviewer-standard, dso:code-reviewer-deep-*). Dispatching a generic agent with reviewer instructions is fabrication per CLAUDE.md rule #8 and REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4. The issue recurs across sessions and host projects despite the mandate being explicit. Root cause: the Agent tool only accepts built-in subagent_type values, and the inline dispatch pattern (read agent file → inject as prompt to general-purpose) is indistinguishable from fabrication to downstream tooling.
